tools.name: search
tools.description: Search the web, GitHub repos/code/issues, or run a deep research investigation.

tools.name: code_analyze
tools.description: Analyze a codebase for complexity metrics, unused exports, or full structural patterns.

tools.name: quality_gate
tools.description: Validate code quality: lint, run tests, check documentation, or run all checks.

tools.name: git_sherlock
tools.description: Investigate git history: blame chains, commit patterns, authorship, and change archaeology.

tools.name: ecosystem_map
tools.description: Map relationships and dependencies across a multi-repo ecosystem.

tools.name: server_health
tools.description: Check API availability and health status.
